---
title: Marcus S. Aichmayr
format: html
image: images/profile.png
about:
  template: solana
  # template: solana
toc: false
---

WIP

<!-- I am a postdoctoral researcher in mathematics at the University of Kassel, Germany. -->

### Research interests

* Circuit computation
* (Oriented) matroid theory
* Linear inequality systems
* Chemical reaction networks

### Programming

* Python
* SageMath
